g.text: Operator updates fields and clicks\n"Save Changes"
Validates provided fields\n(short name, email, phone number, etc.)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM StaffMembers WHERE Email = ? AND Id != ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM StaffMembers WHERE PhoneNumber = ? AND Id != ?
Ensures that all provided qualification names\nexist in the system and retrieves their IDs
SELECT * FROM Qualifications WHERE DescriptiveName IN (names)
Applies changes to the retrieved entity\nand updates modification timestamp
Displays success confirmation\nand refreshes staff details view
